rows.notes: README keeps the narrow-scope guardrails explicit.
README should keep H44 active, preserve H43 as the paper-grade endpoint, and record landed R46 plus required H45 follow-on.
STATUS should record the current H44/H43/R46 stack and explicit merge posture.
Publication record README should expose H45 as active, H43 as the paper-grade endpoint, R47 as next, F22 as blocked, and P30/P29/P28 as current prior sync packets.
The release summary should remain downstream of the landed H43 stack and publication sync.
The manuscript remains a section-ordered draft rather than a stage-status note.
The current-stage driver should remain the canonical H45/H44/H43/R46 control surface.
The layout decision log should record release-summary reuse and governance choices.
The completed P8/P9 digests should remain explicit as the bundle-lock baseline.
